Description:
5Cr15MoV Rosewood Chinese Meat Cleaver 200 mm – Wholesale Professional Grade

This Chinese meat cleaver is engineered for heavy-duty butchery and bulk food preparation, making it a top choice for wholesale buyers supplying commercial kitchens, butcheries, and Asian cuisine restaurants. The blade is forged from 5Cr15MoV high-carbon stainless steel, a material renowned for its balance of hardness, toughness, and stain resistance. This composition allows the cleaver to maintain a sharp edge through repetitive bone chopping, meat slicing, and vegetable dicing tasks without frequent sharpening. The full-tang construction ensures stability and longevity, while the rosewood handle is shaped for ergonomic comfort, reducing hand fatigue during high-volume operations. With a 200 mm blade length and substantial weight, this cleaver delivers the heft needed for clean cuts through poultry bones and thick cuts of meat. Its polished finish resists rust and simplifies cleaning, meeting professional sanitation standards. Available for bulk and wholesale orders, this cleaver is customizable with OEM branding options for retailers and distributors. It is compatible with standard kitchen storage and can be paired with other Chinese kitchen knives for a complete set. For businesses requiring reliable, high-performance cutting tools at wholesale pricing, this cleaver offers exceptional value and durability.
